ui.SIGNUP_SUCCESS: Sign up successful. Please sign in.
ui.UNTAG_POPUP_DESC: This will remove the tag from all the users tagged with this tag. The users will remain in the system.
ui.DELETE_TAG_POPUP_DESC: This will untag the users tagged with this tag and delete the tag. The users will remain in the system.
ui.SITE_SETTINGS_COURSELIT_BRANDING_SUB_CAP: Hide "Powered by CourseLit" on your CourseLit courses and site.
ui.SITE_SETTINGS_PAYMENT_METHOD_RESET_TOOLT: Clear the current payment method and keep saved gateway credentials
ui.SITE_SETTINGS_PAYMENT_METHOD_RESET_CONFI: After reset, all paid plans of all products will fail at checkout with an error. Free plans will keep on working.
ui.REACT_COMPONENT_CRASHED: We've encountered a problem in showing the content
ui.PAYMENT_INITIATION_FAILED: Payment processing failed. Please close this popup and try again.
ui.PAYMENT_VERIFICATION_FAILED: We were not able to verify your payment. Please try again.
ui.STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY_EMPTY: Stripe configuration is invalid. Please contact site admin.
ui.LABEL_DRIP_DELAY: Number of days after the last drip

ui.LESSON_CONTENT_EMBED_PLACEHOLDER: A link to YouTube video etc.

ui.ENROLL_IN_THE_COURSE: You need to be enrolled in the course to view this lesson.
ui.SITE_MAILING_ADDRESS_SETTING_EXPLANATION: This is required in order to comply with the CAN-SPAM Act.

ui.DISCARD_COURSE_CHANGES_POPUP_HEADER: Discard changes made to the course?

ui.SUBHEADER_COURSES_SECTION: Learn new skills with our carefully crafted courses.
ui.SUBHEADER_FEATURED_SECTION: Hand picked resources by the editors.
ui.SUBHEADER_SECTION_PAYMENT_CONFIRMATION_W: Your payment processor sends out notifications about purchases. CourseLit needs these notifications to accurately reflect user purchases. Copy and paste these into your payment processor's webhook settings.

ui.TRANSACTION_STATUS_FAILED_DETAILS: The payment service provider was unable to process your payment. Please go back and try again.

ui.USER_FILTER_SAVE_DESCRIPTION: You can access the saved segments from the Segments dropdown
ui.USER_DELETE_SEGMENT_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete

ui.ERROR_SIGNIN_VERIFYING_LINK: We were unable to sign you in. Please try again.

ui.DELETE_PRODUCT_POPUP_TEXT: This is an irreversible action and all the data and analytics related to this product will be deleted.

ui.FORM_NEW_PRODUCT_MENU_DOWNLOADS_SUBTITLE: A ZIP file containing images, videos, text and more.
ui.PRICING_FREE_SUBTITLE: People can access the content for free. The user needs to be signed in.
ui.PRICING_EMAIL_SUBTITLE: People will be sent the content over email. The user needs not be signed in.
ui.PRICING_PAID_SUBTITLE: People can access the content after a one time payment. The user needs to be signed in.
ui.PRICING_PAID_NO_PAYMENT_METHOD: Set a payment method in Settings to enable this option.
ui.PUBLISH_TAB_STATUS_SUBTITLE: Take your course public or private.
ui.PUBLISH_TAB_VISIBILITY_SUBTITLE: The product stays hidden and can only be accessed by a direct URL.
ui.ACCOUNT_NO_PURCHASE_PLACEHOLDER: Your enrolled courses will show up here.
ui.GENERIC_FAILURE_MESSAGE: That didn't work. Please try again.

ui.ERROR_DELAY_EMPTY: Scheduled date is not in the future
ui.PAGE_PLACEHOLDER_MAIL: Your mails will show up here

ui.SEO_FORM_SOCIAL_IMAGE_TOOLTIP: While sharing this page on social media like Twitter or Facebook, this image will be used.
ui.USER_PERMISSION_AREA_SUBTEXT: Control what actions this user can perform in your school.

ui.SSO_PROVIDER_REMOVE_DIALOG_DESC: Are you sure you want to remove this provider?
ui.APIKEY_REMOVE_DIALOG_DESC: If you are using this key in your application, removing it will break the integration. There is no going back if you remove it.
ui.USER_DELETE_DIALOG_DESCRIPTION: This action is irreversible. Products and communities owned by this user will be transferred to you and other data will be deleted.
ui.USER_DELETE_DIALOG_MIGRATION_HEADING: What will move to your account
ui.USER_DELETE_DIALOG_MIGRATION_ITEM_PRODUC: Products, lessons, and pages created by this user will be reassigned to you.
ui.USER_DELETE_DIALOG_MIGRATION_ITEM_EMAIL: Email templates, sequences, and deliveries created by this user will be reassigned to you.
ui.USER_DELETE_DIALOG_MIGRATION_ITEM_AUDIEN: Audience assets such as segments, themes, payment plans, and ongoing sequences will be reassigned to you.
ui.USER_DELETE_DIALOG_MIGRATION_ITEM_COMMUN: Community moderator roles and community pages managed by this user will be reassigned to you.
ui.USER_DELETE_DIALOG_DELETION_ITEM_COMMUNI: Notifications, mail statuses, lesson evaluations, download links, certificates, and activity logs.
Community posts, comments, replies, subscriptions, reports, and related likes.
ui.USER_DELETE_DIALOG_DELETION_ITEM_COMMERC: Memberships, invoices, course enrollments, and marketing sequence entries.
ui.USER_DELETE_DIALOG_DELETION_ITEM_ACCOUNT: The user's avatar media and account.
ui.DELETE_PAGE_POPUP_TEXT: This is an irreversible action and all the data related to this page will be deleted.
ui.NEW_PAGE_FORM_WARNING: These settings cannot be changed later on, so proceed with caution.

ui.COMMUNITY_MEMBERSHIP_LIST_SUBHEADER: Review and manage memberships in your community
